case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CARLOS OMAR BARRERA HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR. 02, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CARLOS OMAR BARRERA $2,368.70 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,473.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - ( FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-21-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CARLOS OMAR BARRERA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 2/26/19/ PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,560.70 AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CARLOS OMAR BARRERA
